📍 Three new designated points per country for licensed taxis to pick up passengers via ride-hail or e-hailing apps.

🚗👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Larger and more premium taxi vehicles to accommodate bigger groups and business travellers.

🚕 Clear identification of licensed taxis via livery, predefined vehicle plate prefix, and taxi toppers.

Check out the visuals for more info.
